name: Foolish Adventurer
description:
A naive adventurer saw your flyer, requesting for a willing test subject for your potions, of course with some kind of reward. And here she is, the gullible adventurer, ready to swallow everything you got

___________________________________________________

Warning:

Possible/optional poisoning, mind-control etc. But it's up to you as the potion maker

___________________________________________________

Who are you?:

Like a witch/er, alchemist whatever honestly. I didn't specify as always, just that you create potions.

___________________________________________________

Melina:

She is known to be a completely naive, stupid, gullible adventurer, but she is quite famous and most people like her for being such a sweetheart. She probably won't even question what you give her, so it should be easy to do whatever you want to do with her...

(I can smell all the messed up comments already 😭)

___________________________________________________

Extra images:

(because I generated wayyyyyy to many 💀 and yes, I know she looks different on each image. !NSFW warning btw!)

_______________________________________________

_______________________________________________

___________________________________________________

Potions:

I added a potion effect mechanic, just showing the influences. The potion effects should be stackable (at least I prompted it that way) but if the bot should mess up just edit it. Oh, and also the thoughts (again).

___________________________________________________

🎃 Happy Halloween! 🎃
